description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with docker:dind and postgres:16 services and defines variables CONTAINER_REGISTRY, CONTAINER_IMAGE_BUILD, CONTAINER_IMAGE_BUILD_CACHE, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD. Define two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs the global before_script (apk add --no-cache nodejs yarn and docker login with $CI_JOB_TOKEN), then executes docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE_BUILD_CACHE || true, docker build --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE_BUILD_CACHE -t $CONTAINER_IMAGE_BUILD ., docker tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE_BUILD $CONTAINER_IMAGE_BUILD_CACHE, and docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE_BUILD; also add a test job that uses the node:22-alpine image, runs before_script yarn install, sets DATABASE_HOST_TEST=postgres, and runs yarn run test. In the release stage add a deploy job that only runs on the master branch when $HEROKU_API_KEY is present, runs apk add --no-cache npm, npm i -g heroku, docker login to registry.heroku.com with $HEROKU_API_KEY, then pushes and releases the container to Heroku with heroku container:push web --app denkmal-api and heroku container:release web --app denkmal-api.
